rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component type or implementation scopes while preserving AADL architecture.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes.
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Use AGREE logical operators and initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {**... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts.
Use nested `if... then... else` for branching logic.
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not use opaque Boolean data range comparisons unless the requirement and AADL data representation provide a numeric scalar.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax notes on annex placement and validator diagnostics
